'''Io Desnand''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the [[Aida system/Legends|Aida]] and [[Lomabu system/Legends|Lomabu systems]].

==Biography==
In a bid to gain favor with Imperial leaders and get a promotion for himself, Desnand planned to use the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Prison/Legends|penal colony]] on [[Lomabu III]] as bait in a trap to destroy the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel fleet]], which would sooner or later have to embark on a rescue mission for the imprisoned Wookiees.

Desnand's plans were interrupted, however, when [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]] and [[Chenlambec]] lured [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] to Lomabu III by claiming the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] had gone there to free the Wookiees after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. They were able to free the Wookiees and turn Bossk over to Desnand, claiming he had instigated the attack on the prison. Believing Bossk had ruined his chances for promotion, Desnand had him thrown into prison with plans to give his wife [[Feebee Desnand|Feebee]] a lizard-skin gown; however, Bossk escaped before the skinning was to take place.
